productDisplayName: Jungle Book Boys Green Flip Flops
description: Style Note Gear up your little hero for his everyday adventures with this pair of flip-flops from jungle book. Featuring an attractive print on its footbed, this pair will easily capture his heart. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for an outing in the park.
